Explore Our Services Our Story
Who We Are

Built on Vision.
Driven by Purpose.

VTEC Business Group is a modern, multi-service holding entity founded in October 2025 with the vision of building a dynamic platform that connects education, trade, empowerment, and professional consultancy within Kenya's growing economy.

What Does VTEC Stand For?

V
Visionary Forward-thinking strategy built for where Kenya's economy is heading.
T
Trade The commercial backbone — movement of goods, services, and ideas.
E
Empowerment Raising people before profits — through knowledge and opportunity.
C
Consultancy The intellectual engine guiding strategic decisions that shape futures.

Holding Entity Structure

Three diversified sub-brands under one powerful parent group, sharing resources, vision, and network.

Rooted in Kenya

Operating within Kenya's urban economic landscape, designed for the Kenyan market, with continental ambitions.

2035 Empire Vision

A clear 10 year roadmap to building a recognized, impactful, and profitable business empire.

Co Founded Leadership

Three complementary co founders bringing vision, operations, and growth expertise together.

What We Do

Our Business Arms

Three strategically positioned sub-brands, each serving a distinct market need — yet all unified under the VTEC Business Group umbrella.

Education

InvestorMind Academy

Kenya's dedicated financial literacy and investment education platform. We bridge the knowledge gap between everyday Kenyans and the wealth-building tools available to them.

NSE Stock Market Money Market Funds SACCOs Financial Literacy Investment Strategy
Explore Academy →
Consultancy

VTEC Consultancy Services

Strategic professional services tailored for Kenya's business landscape. We guide entrepreneurs, SMEs, and brands to make smarter decisions and build stronger market presence.

Financial Consulting Brand Consulting Content Marketing Business Strategy
Request Consultation →
Coming Soon
Retail

VTEC Retail Services

A premium clothing and apparel retail venture currently in its pre-launch phase. Designed to bring quality, style, and accessibility to Kenya's urban fashion market.

Apparel Urban Fashion Kenyan Market Coming 2025/26
Notify Me at Launch →
In Development
Digital Arm

MILIKI App

The flagship digital solution within the VTEC ecosystem — built to redefine asset ownership and wealth management for the modern Kenyan investor. Drawn from the Swahili word miliki, meaning "to own," MILIKI will bring every asset class including NSE equities, Money Market Funds, and bonds under one transparent, user-friendly dashboard.

NSE Equities Money Market Funds Wealth Tracking Asset Ownership Financial Dashboard
Join the Waitlist →
The Ecosystem

One Group. Four Pillars.

A connected ecosystem of brands and digital tools — each engineered to educate, empower, and equip the modern Kenyan investor. Tap any card to learn more.

VTEC Business Group

The visionary holding entity uniting education, consultancy, retail, and digital innovation under one Kenyan-grown umbrella.

InvestorMind Academy

The educational backbone of VTEC — building financial literacy, investor discipline, and the Alpha mindset for wealth creation.

InvestorMind Academy

Kenya's Premier Financial Literacy Platform

Empowering Kenyans with investment knowledge, financial discipline, and wealth-building strategies — covering NSE, MMFs, SACCOs and beyond.

Facebook LinkedIn TikTok WhatsApp Channel Email Us

Follow InvestorMind Academy for daily financial literacy content, NSE insights, and investment tips.

500 Plus Students Enrolled

Featured Courses

Three flagship programmes designed to take you from financial novice to confident investor.

4 Weeks · Beginner

Investing 101 for Kenyans

Foundations of personal finance, savings discipline, and your first NSE trade explained simply.

Join Waitlist
6 Weeks · Intermediate

NSE Mastery

Deep dive into the Nairobi Securities Exchange: stock analysis, portfolio building, and market timing.

Enroll Now
8 Weeks · Advanced

Wealth Building Blueprint

MMFs, SACCOs, real estate, and long term compounding strategies for the disciplined Kenyan investor.

Join Waitlist
Our Advantage

Why Choose VTEC?

Four reasons clients, students, and partners choose to grow with the VTEC Business Group ecosystem.

Kenya First Approach

We are built for the Kenyan economic landscape. Every service, strategy, and solution is designed with the local market in mind.

Integrated Business Ecosystem

Education, consultancy, and retail working together under one roof. VTEC clients benefit from all three arms simultaneously.

Practical, Not Theoretical

We deliver real results and actionable strategies. Our approach is rooted in real world Kenyan business experience.

Built for the Long Game

With a clear 2035 empire vision, VTEC is not a short term venture. We are building for decades, and our clients grow with us.

In Partnership

Strategic Partnerships

Working hand in hand with trusted partners who share our vision for impact and growth.

Dukedom Media
Founder
Mr. Dukedom Makori

Dukedom Media is a dynamic online media channel delivering compelling content in Sports and News. With a growing community of over 1,000 followers and 5,200+ posts, Dukedom Media is committed to bold storytelling and keeping audiences informed and engaged across multiple digital platforms.

Contact
@Dukedommedia 0705 494594
X, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook & TikTok
Logo Coming Soon
The Grace Foundation
Founder
Maurine Mbuthia

The Grace Foundation is a Nairobi based community foundation founded by Trauma Therapist Mbuthia Maurine. The foundation specializes in supporting individuals dealing with Post Abortion Trauma and those navigating pregnancy journeys, providing compassionate care, healing, and dignity to those who need it most.

Contact
+254 711 475 853 thegracefoundation366@gmail.com
Nairobi, Kenya

Our Roadmap

Where We're Headed

Every great empire begins with a clear destination. VTEC Business Group is building purposefully toward 2035.

The 2035
Empire Vision

VTEC Business Group was founded with a clear long-term objective — to build a recognized, multi-arm business empire serving the Kenyan and African market by 2035. We are not in a hurry. We are building right.

Be Part of the Journey
2025
Founded
VTEC Business Group officially launched in Nairobi, Kenya.
Completed
2026
Digital Launch
Rolling out InvestorMind Academy cohorts and the MILIKI App platform.
In Progress
2027
Retail Launch
Opening VTEC Retail Services with curated commerce nationwide.
2030
Regional Expansion
Scaling VTEC services across East Africa with new regional hubs.
2035
Empire Status
A recognized multi arm Kenyan business empire serving the region.
